name: 06-16-pkcs-m3-retrieval-context-pack-design
title: brainstorm: PKCS M3 retrieval and Context Pack design
creator: tantless
notes: M3 design brainstorm started. User confirmed baseline-first on 2026-06-17 and pointed out baseline requires a real corpus. M3A0 corpus bootstrap and M3A1 baseline eval scaffold are now complete. Baseline run shows Chinese natural questions currently return empty results against mostly English corpus content, so M3B should start with query normalization/keyword extraction before changing retrieval behavior.

meta.m3a1_baseline_observation: Chinese natural no-marker eval queries produced 6/6 empty results with simple FTS; English title-style smoke queries hit expected sources.
